rationale: C+B is soundly implemented under my ADR/ownership/blast-radius lens. (1) internal/gitutil is cleanly dropped: the execution bullet (line 29) explicitly states it DROPS OUT with no gitutil change landing; the Scope orphans.go bullet (line 52) repeats 'NO internal/gitutil change lands'; Non-Goals + the Validation-Proofs negative pin ('! grep BranchExistsE / show-ref') enforce it. BranchExistsE/show-ref/ScanOrphanedClosedBeads are 0-hits at HEAD. The 8 remaining gitutil citations are all descriptive references to UNCHANGED code (MergeInto/IsAncestor/BranchExists) — no dangling change-surface claim. (2) FindOrphanedClosedBeads stays the byte-identical fail-open wrapper; all three consumers (complete.go:111, next.go:459, doctor/orphaned_beads.go:16) use it, and branchExistsFn stays the shared bool in both core and wrapper — reverting the existence leg disturbs none of them. (3) internal/lifecycle claimed by exactly one domain (workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9; 0 in core/execution/context-system) — AC10 pins the exactly-one invariant; internal/approve at :3. (4) ADR-0030: internal/approve is a listed enforcement package; the MergeBase-in-ApproveImpl reliance (Fact 1, impl.go:249) lives in the enforcement package via the exec.MergeBase Executor seam — a correct boundary fit, enforcement out of the executor. ADR-0037 amendment coherent. (5) The blp6 FinalizeEpic worktree-gated-merge constraint is pinned by an existing AC (AC12), not new scope — a non-creeping addition. Facts 1 & 2 grounded at impl.go:249 and mindspec_executor.go:383/385/402.

findings.item: gitutil dropped from Impacted Domains + Scope; no BranchExistsE seam; execution bullet states it; no dangling reference
findings.evidence: spec:29 (execution bullet), spec:52 (Scope), spec:98 (negative pin); git grep BranchExistsE/show-ref/ScanOrphanedClosedBeads @8b07e89f = 0 hits; 8 remaining gitutil citations all reference unchanged code

findings.item: FindOrphanedClosedBeads wrapper stays byte-identical for complete/next/doctor; error-core branch-existence revert to bool does not disturb the three consumers
findings.evidence: complete.go:111, cmd/mindspec/next.go:459 checkUnmergedBeads, internal/doctor/orphaned_beads.go:16 all bind lifecycle.FindOrphanedClosedBeads; branchExistsFn (orphans.go:40) shared bool in core+wrapper; ScanOrphanedClosedBeads absent (RED)
workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9 sole claimant; core/execution/context-system = 0; AC10 pins whole-set exactly-one

findings.item: ADR-0030 (executor boundary; enforcement stays in approve/lifecycle; MergeBase reliance in the enforcement package not the executor) + ADR-0037 touchpoints unbroken
findings.evidence: ADR-0030:23 lists internal/approve as enforcement pkg; Fact 1 MergeBase at impl.go:249 uses exec.MergeBase Executor seam within internal/approve; ADR-0037/-0030 files present; amendment described spec:35-36, AC9

findings.item: blp6-invariant constraint (future FinalizeEpic changes must preserve worktree-gated merge) is coherent, non-scope-creeping
findings.evidence: Non-Goals spec:74 pins the constraint to existing AC12 (TestFinalizeEpic_MergesOnlyWorktreeRealBranches); adds no new implementation surface; Fact 2 grounded at mindspec_executor.go:383/385/402
